howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Booking your vehicle is simple and fast
howItWorks.label: Simple & fast

steps.title: Contact us on WhatsApp
steps.desc: Message us your dates and destination. We reply in minutes with availability and pricing.

steps.title: Choose your vehicle
steps.desc: Select the car that best fits your trip and group. Filter by passengers, drive type, and budget.

steps.title: Reserve with 50% deposit
steps.desc: Confirm with half the total. We accept bank transfer, SINPE, cash, and credit card.

steps.title: Receive your vehicle
steps.desc: We deliver at our Turrialba branch or Juan Santamaría International Airport (SJO).

destinations.title: Popular destinations
destinations.subtitle: From Turrialba, all of Costa Rica is within reach

items.name: Arenal & La Fortuna
items.desc: Volcanoes, hot springs, and tropical jungle. We recommend the Vitara 4×4 for mountain routes.

items.name: Manuel Antonio
items.desc: Paradise beaches and Costa Rica's most-visited national park. The Venue is perfect for this destination.

items.name: Monteverde
items.desc: Hanging bridges and cloud forest. For groups of up to 7, the Rush is our ideal choice.

items.name: Guanacaste - Tamarindo
items.desc: North Pacific beaches, surfing, and spectacular sunsets. The perfect destination for beach lovers and adventurers.

items.name: Tortuguero
items.desc: Freshwater canals, tropical jungle, and sea turtle nesting. A unique destination for nature lovers.

items.name: Central Valley - San José
items.desc: The capital and surroundings: museums, markets, Costa Rican cuisine, and the perfect base to explore the country.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Real Google reviews from those who explored Costa Rica with us

placeholder.name: Fernando Martinez
placeholder.text: Excelente experiencia alquilando un coche con ellos este fin de semana. La atención de Diego impecable (nos ayudó en todo lo que necesitamos) y el coche en muy buenas condiciones!

placeholder.name: A López
placeholder.text: Queremos agradecer y recomendar ampliamente a Sloth Rent a Car. Manuel y Diego nos atendieron con muchísima cortesía. Los vehículos estaban en perfectas condiciones, muy limpios. Los precios fueron muy buenos y transparentes. Definitivamente volveríamos a rentar con ellos.

placeholder.name: Xadani Uribe Jiménez
placeholder.text: Gran experiencia para conocer todo Costa Rica, siempre en buena comunicación y el vehículo (Toyota Agya) estaba en excelentes condiciones, 100% volveré a alquilar con Sloth.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking

items.a: All our vehicles include: CDW insurance (Collision Damage Waiver), personal accident insurance, third-party liability, theft protection, and 24/7 roadside assistance. Zero-deductible coverage is not included — available for an additional $15/day.

items.q: What is the deductible in case of an accident?
items.a: The standard deductible is $800 USD in the event of an incident. To eliminate this deductible, we offer zero-deductible coverage for just $15 USD per day, available at the time of booking.

items.q: How does the security deposit work?
items.a: The security deposit is $400 USD for economy vehicles (Agya, Swift) and $500 USD for SUVs. Paid by credit card or bank transfer. Refunded within 5–15 business days after inspection with no incidents.
More than 2 weeks in advance: 100% refund. Less than 2 weeks: 75% refund. Less than 1 week: no refund. A 50% deposit is required to confirm the booking.
We accept bank transfer, SINPE Móvil, cash in colones or dollars, and credit card. The security deposit must be paid by credit card or bank transfer.

Yes. We deliver and receive vehicles at Juan Santamaría International Airport (SJO) and at our Turrialba branch (Plaza Nuri, opposite the main IET entrance). Check availability and delivery rates via WhatsApp.
Yes. We offer child seats for $10 USD per day. You can add one at the time of booking.

items.q: What are the age and documentation requirements?
items.a: You must be at least 23 years old (21+ for some models), hold a valid driver's license recognized in Costa Rica, have a passport or national ID, and a credit card for the security deposit.
